steps.title: Collect the variable terms
steps.content:
Start with
$$
x(r-5)+4=17x+28
$$
Move constants and $x$-terms to get
$$
x(r-5)-17x=24
$$
$$
x(r-22)=24
$$

steps.title: Find the excluded value
steps.content: A linear equation of the form $ax=24$ has exactly one solution only when $a\ne 0$. Here the coefficient is $r-22$, so the equation fails that condition when $$ r-22=0 $$ $$ r=22 $$ The answer is D.
